infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Garuda People captures your location only while you punch in/out for attendance.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Garuda People logs your work location while you are punched in, as required by HR policy.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Garuda People logs your work location while you are punched in.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Garuda People needs the camera to capture a selfie when you punch in/out.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Garuda People needs photo access to upload a profile picture.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Garuda People uses Face ID to unlock the app quickly.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Garuda People logs your work location while you are punched in.

plugins.cameraPermission: Garuda People needs the camera to capture a selfie when you punch in/out.

plugins.faceIDPermission: Garuda People uses Face ID to unlock the app quickly.
